$schema_comment: ADSK adopter profiles — machine-readable contract for create-adsk. Docs must not invent a different skill list. See docs/product/create-adsk.md.
do_not: Expose a third-party or arbitrary GitHub skill catalog in create-adsk UX
Reimplement skill install — shell out to npx skills
Present create-adsk as a skills.sh menu wrapper
Put sync-adsk.sh kit (maintainer symlink mode) behind create-adsk

delivery.description: SDD plus DevOps strategy and release automation.

maintainer.description: Full first-party kit including skill authoring and README workflows.

skills-only.description: All first-party skills; no Cursor commands or rules writes.

optional_packs.description: Optional yes/no after profile choice — not a skill picker. Install via recommended-skills.json.
